name: ER Design for a University System
description: Design and implement a university course enrollment schema with proper constraints

checks.name: All four tables exist
checks.query: SELECT COUNT(*) AS n FROM information_schema.tables WHERE table_name IN ('students','professors','courses','enrollments');
checks.description: Tables students, professors, courses, and enrollments must all exist

checks.name: courses has foreign key to professors
checks.query: SELECT COUNT(*) AS n FROM duckdb_constraints() WHERE table_name = 'courses' AND constraint_type = 'FOREIGN KEY';
checks.description: courses must have a FOREIGN KEY to professors

checks.name: enrollments has foreign keys to students and courses
checks.query: SELECT COUNT(*) AS n FROM duckdb_constraints() WHERE table_name = 'enrollments' AND constraint_type = 'FOREIGN KEY';
checks.description: enrollments must have 2 FOREIGN KEY constraints (students and courses)

checks.name: 3 students inserted
checks.query: SELECT COUNT(*) AS n FROM students;

checks.name: 5 enrollments inserted
checks.query: SELECT COUNT(*) AS n FROM enrollments;
